apollo_short_description:
Stetson is an American hat company founded in 1865 by John B. Stetson in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. It is renowned for creating the cowboy hat and is a leader in high-quality headwear with a strong connection to Western heritage. The company gained fame with its "Boss of the Plains" hat, which became synonymous with the American cowboy image. At its peak, Stetson operated the world's largest hat factory, producing nearly 2 million hats annually.

Today, Stetson specializes in premium felt and straw hats designed for durability and functionality. The Garland, Texas factory employs over 200 workers and produces about one million hats each year using traditional handcrafted methods. Stetson offers a wide variety of styles for both men and women, focusing on quality and resilience. The brand continues to be a trusted icon, reflecting over 150 years of American craftsmanship.

It is known for revolutionizing the gaming industry with iconic arcade games and home video game consoles. Atari's early successes include the groundbreaking arcade game *Pong* and the popular home console Atari 2600, which sold millions of units. The company played a significant role in the golden age of arcade gaming and has continued to influence the industry for over 50 years.

Atari's product lineup includes classic arcade games like *Asteroids* and *Centipede*, as well as home consoles and computers. The company has also expanded into modern gaming, developing PC, console, and mobile games that leverage its well-known brands. Atari is committed to innovative leisure entertainment, focusing on quality and creativity in game development and publishing.

apollo_short_description:
GreenPan™ is an award-winning, sustainably built line of healthy nonstick ceramic cookware perfect for every kitchen - with colorful pieces and collections that will catch your eye.

Our Valencia Pro cookware collection has been recognized with a Good Housekeeping 2023 Sustainable Innovation Award for the use of certified recycled aluminum. 

Our sustainability efforts don't stop there. We will safely recycle your old cookware.

The Original GreenPan brand is under the umbrella companies owned by The Cookware Company, which has offices around the globe. 

We've revolutionized and redefined cookware. 

Visit https://www.greenpan.us/ to learn more about our cookware, ovenware, electrics, cutlery, utensils, and more.

apollo_keywords: horticulture:dutch flower bulbs:large quantity bulbs:wholesale trade:rare bulb varieties:bulk flower bulbs:services:perennials wholesale:planting instructions:b2c:perennials:gardening supplies:gardeners:wholesale gardening supplies:garden maintenance:flower bulb varieties:garden care tips:gardening resources:bulb naturalizing:dutch-grown bulbs
apollo_short_description:
K. van Bourgondien has offered Dutch bulbs and perennials for more than 175 years. The family-owned company was started in Hillegom, Holland, in 1845 as a grower of tulips and other flower bulbs. By the 1880s, the family offered bulbs through commercial catalogs.

Very early in the 20th century, the van Bourgondien family started a mail-order company in the United States that supplied greenhouses and cut-flower growers, making us one of the first bulb-by-mail suppliers. Over time, K. van Bourgondien became one of the world's leading wholesale distributors of Dutch bulbs and perennials.

Bulbs could not be imported from Holland during World War II, so we temporarily grew ours in the U.S. until after the war, when bulb cultivation returned to the Netherlands. We still maintain a strong presence there with a full-time staff of buyers and experts there who regularly visit Dutch growers and hybridizers to inspect their products.

Today, K. van Bourgondien serves thousands of customers annually, ranging from weekend gardeners to professional landscapers. We offer top-quality products at low prices backed by outstanding customer service and our No-Risk Guarantee.You can be confident that we use only the most conscientious and trusted growers to provide you with the most exquisite results in your landscaping projects, every time. From our newest floral finds, to tried-and-true old favorites, our trademark remains—providing you with the quality, selection and service you deserve the first time, and every time.

apollo_short_description:
Bear Archery is a prominent manufacturer of archery equipment, established in 1933 by Fred Bear and Charles Piper in Detroit, Michigan. Originally starting as Bear Products Company, the business shifted focus to archery in 1938 after hiring bowyer Nels Grumley. The company became known for its innovative products, including the first patented bow quiver in 1946 and the working recurve limb design in 1953. Bear Archery has a rich history of milestones, including the introduction of the fiberglass Kodiak II recurve bow in 1954 and the first compound bow, the Alaskan, in 1975.

Today, Bear Archery specializes in a wide range of bows, arrows, and accessories for both hunting and target archery. apollo_keywords: french dip sandwich & hot mustard:french dip sandwich:hot mustard:sides:retail:pickles:sandwiches:chili:philippe mathieu:french dip origin:restaurants and food services:deli cuisine:salads:french roll dipping:dining in chinatown la:b2c:salads & more:gravy:alameda location:soups
apollo_short_description:
Philippe The Original is one of the oldest and best known restaurants in Southern California. Philippe's was established in 1908 by Philippe Mathieu, who claimed the distinction of having created the "French Dipped Sandwich." One day in 1918, while making a sandwich, Mathieu inadvertently dropped the sliced french roll into the roasting pan filled with juice still hot from the oven. The patron, a policeman, said he would take the sandwich anyway and returned the next day with some friends asking for more dipped sandwiches. And so was born the "French Dipped Sandwich," so called either because of Mathieu's French heritage, the French roll the sandwich is made on or because the officer's name was French. The answer is lost to history.

Philippe's "French Dipped Sandwich" is the specialty of the house and consists of either roast beef, roast pork, leg of lamb, turkey or ham served on a lightly textured, freshly baked French roll which has been dipped in the natural gravy of the roasts. Swiss, Cheddar, American, Monterey Jack or Blue cheese may be added. To accompany your sandwich we offer a tart, tangy cole slaw, homemade potato and macaroni salads, hard boiled eggs pickled in beet juice and spices, large Kosher style, sour dill or sweet pickles, black olives and hot yellow chili peppers.

description: Since 1954, Veselka, a beloved Ukrainian restaurant, has been serving up Ukrainian food from the same location in the heart of the East Village, NYC.

apollo_short_description:
Veselka, which means rainbow in Ukrainian, was founded by Volodymyr and Olha Darmochwal in 1954. Volodymyr and his wife were Ukrainian refugees in the late 1940s and found a home in the Little Ukraine neighborhood of the East Village of Manhattan.

Ever since then, Veselka has grown from a small newsstand into a 24-hour gathering place, serving up Ukrainian soul food with traditional dishes like pierogi/varenyky, stuffed cabbage, potato pancakes, blintzes and goulash to the delight of locals and visitors alike.

The restaurant, now owned and operated by Volodymyr's grandson, Jason Birchard, was owned and operated by Tom Birchard for many years, the son-in-law of the original founders. Throughout the restaurant's 70-year history, it has been expanded several times, been featured in many prominent films (such as Ocean's 8, Trainwreck and Juno) along with numerous features in local and national publications. Veselka is, put simply, an institution of New York City.

Beyond the acclaim and popularity amongst its customers, Veselka continues to be a pillar in the local Ukrainian community. Ukrainians mostly comprise its staff and the owners. Veselka remains very active in the local community, supporting the Ukrainian National Institute, Razom for Ukraine, and local St. George's Church via food and monetary donations on a regular basis.

apollo_short_description:
Jenny and Heather were moms with young girls that loved to dress up.  Jenny ran a daycare and Heather would drop her princess off for playtime while she ran errands.  Jenny's home was full of adventure.  There was sidewalk chalk, art projects, dance recitals, finger paint and a huge trunk full of dress ups.  It was heaven for kids!

Princess Lauren (Heather's daughter) was not your average princess. She was of the INDUSTRIAL variety.  Lauren preferred water fights to tea parties, running over walking, but most of all she loved to dress up! She lived in a princess dress!  The problem was, she could outlast any princess dress available, and was usually the cause of their quick demise.

Princess Kelly (Jenny's daughter) was a traditional princess. She loved tea parties, dancing, listening to music and baby dolls.  She loved hosting tea parties and enjoyed playing house.  She loved wearing princess dresses, but couldn't stay in them long if they were itchy and uncomfortable.  Which was the case of most dress ups of the time.

Heather and Jenny were frustrated with the fact that dress ups couldn't be washed.  The fabrics would fall apart in the washing machine and many were made to be dry-cleaning only, an absolutely absurd idea!

On a fall afternoon, in Jenny's living room, the idea was created, DRESS UPS MADE FOR EVERYDAY PLAY!  Dress ups made comfortable and soft, easy to put on and take off, light weight for all day play and best of all machine washable!

Little Adventures strong core message that "CHILDHOOD IS AN ADVENTURE!" is what continues to fuel their creative fire.  They love seeing the joy in kids that are free to play, to explore and free to dream!

Jenny with her ten children, and Heather with her five, put their hearts into Little Adventures dress ups. They included everything they wanted for their own kids.  They love the journey and are passionate about their families, their employees, and their mission…making the best dress ups out there!

apollo_short_description:
King Ranch Saddle Shop is a historic leather goods manufacturer and retailer based in Kingsville, Texas. Established in the late 1860s by Captain Richard King, the shop originally focused on crafting durable saddles and gear for ranching needs. Over the years, it has gained a reputation for high-quality, handmade leather products, including custom saddles, harnesses, bridles, and outdoor wear. The shop employs skilled artisans who utilize traditional methods to create items that are built to withstand the rigors of ranch life.

Today, King Ranch Saddle Shop operates from the John B. Ragland Mercantile Building, a historic site that reflects the company’s rich heritage. The shop not only offers premium leather goods but also serves as a cultural hub, showcasing the legacy of the King Ranch in cattle and Western culture. Its products are marked with the iconic Running W brand and are known for their craftsmanship and durability, making them sought after by ranchers and enthusiasts alike.

apollo_short_description:
The Sausage Maker, Inc is the ultimate resource for hunters, gatherers, anglers, farmers and just about anyone else who likes to take game, meats, fruits and vegetables and transform them into the sausage, cider and vegetable recipes that have been handed down by generations of like-minded folks. 

 In 1972, after decades of making sausages and cured meats, both at home and professionally, the late Rytek Kutas founded The Sausage Maker, Inc. The reason: finding quality sausage casings, cures and spices at an affordable price was extremely difficult in many parts of of the country. The issue wasn't just about supplying the products, it was about helping folks to keep their family traditions alive.

Here at The Sausage Maker, we continue to embrace the time honored traditions of home food preparation with a variety of seasonings, spices and equipment. Our offerings have continued to expand over the years. We now carry a variety of products, many of which are manufactured at our plant, right here in Buffalo, New York. The rest are thoughtfully sourced from across the U.S.A. and around the world. 

We know that as a customer, you have many choices when it comes to who you buy your food dehydrator, smokehouse, spices and other equipment from. That's why we're committed to standing behind each and every product we sell. Whether you have a question, problem or just need a little direction on which product is right for you, we're here to help. We love the products we sell and we love using them. Order online, by mail or over the phone. However you want to communicate with us, we're standing by ready to help!

High West Distillery, located in Park City, Utah, is the state's first legally licensed distillery since 1870. Founded in 2006 by David Perkins and his wife Jane, the distillery is known for its innovative approach to American whiskey-making. High West began in a historic livery stable and has since expanded to a state-of-the-art facility on Blue Sky Ranch, featuring advanced distillation equipment and a high-altitude tasting room.

Visitors can enjoy guided distillery tours, tastings, and dining experiences at the High West Saloon, which offers a unique ski-in, ski-out setting. Master distiller Brendan Coyle leads the product development, contributing to High West's reputation for quality and craftsmanship in whiskey.

Our signature feature is the Forum, which subjects arguments on pressing issues of public concern to constructive scrutiny and debate. Our 50-year archive features work by leading writers and public intellectuals, including Noam Chomsky, Susan Sontag, Robin D. G. apollo_short_description:
Kent International Inc is an American bicycle manufacturer based in Fairfield, New Jersey. It imports and distributes bicycles and bicycle accessories worldwide. As of 2014, it was considered the 2nd largest manufacturer of bicycles in the United States. Kent dates back to the early 1900s when Abraham Kamler, an immigrant to the United States, began restoring bicycles in New York City. Kamler opened his own bike shop on the Lower East Side in 1909 and later moved to a larger location in Newark, New Jersey.
The current Charimans father started his own company called Philkam Cycle in 1947, supplying bikes and parts to stores all over the Eastern United States. Philkam Cycle changed its name in 1958 to Kent International. In 1979 it began manufacturing bicycles in Kearny, New Jersey, but closed its factory and moved manufacturing overseas in 1990. It returned manufacturing to the United States in 2014, building a facility in Clarendon County, South Carolina.
Life is better when we all Pedal Together!
